'''Loiin Sool''' was one of the [[Shamed Ones]] working at the [[Eighth cortex damutek]] on [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]]. When [[Master Shaper]] [[Nen Yim]] contacted the Prophet [[Nom Anor|Yu'Shaa]] about taking her to [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]], Loiin Sool delivered the message to Yu'shaa.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}}
